mapper.sql: select a.id, a.consume_bill_no, a.consume_bill_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.user_id, a.consume_bill_status, a.del_flag, a.delete_by, a.delete_time, a.tenant_id, a.reverse_flag, a.reverse_of_consume_id, a.reverse_of_bill_no, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.reject_reason, w.id wId,w.code warehouseCode,w.name warehouseName,a.audit_by,a.audit_date, u.user_id userId,u.nick_name nickName,u.user_name userName,d.code departmentCode,d.name departmentName, cu.nick_name createNickName,cu.user_name createUserName, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, COALESCE((select SUM(IFNULL(entry.amt, 0)) from t_hc_ks_xh_entry entry where entry.paren_id = a.id and entry.del_flag != 1), 0) as total_amount from t_hc_ks_xh a left join fd_warehouse w on a.warehouse_id = w.id left join sys_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_name
mapper.select: select a.id, a.consume_bill_no, a.consume_bill_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.user_id, a.consume_bill_status, a.del_flag, a.delete_by, a.delete_time, a.tenant_id, a.reverse_flag, a.reverse_of_consume_id, a.reverse_of_bill_no, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.reject_reason, b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.unit_price as sub_unit_price, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, b.dep_inventory_id as sub_dep_inventory_id, b.kc_no as sub_kc_no, b.batch_id as sub_batch_id, b.warehouse_id as sub_warehouse_id, b.department_id as sub_department_id, b.supplier_id as sub_supplier_id, b.factory_id as sub_factory_id, b.material_no as sub_material_no, b.remark as sub_remark, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.del_flag as sub_del_flag, b.main_barcode as sub_main_barcode, b.sub_barcode as sub_sub_barcode, b.material_date as sub_material_date, b.warehouse_date as sub_warehouse_date, b.settlement_type as sub_settlement_type, b.material_name as sub_material_name, b.material_speci as sub_material_speci, b.material_model as sub_material_model, b.material_factory_id as sub_material_factory_id, b.delete_by as sub_delete_by, b.delete_time as sub_delete_time, b.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, b.src_consume_id as sub_src_consume_id, b.src_consume_bill_no as sub_src_consume_bill_no, b.src_consume_entry_id as sub_src_consume_entry_id, b.src_consume_qty as sub_src_consume_qty, b.src_can_reverse_qty as sub_src_can_reverse_qty, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, cu.nick_name createrNickName,cu.user_name createrUserName,a.audit_by,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName from t_hc_ks_xh a left join t_hc_ks_xh_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id and b.del_flag != 1 left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_name left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id where a.id = #{id} and a.del_flag != 1 and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_hc_ks_xh
consume_bill_no, consume_bill_date, warehouse_id, department_id, user_id, consume_bill_status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_by, delete_time, remark, audit_by, audit_date, reject_reason, reverse_flag, reverse_of_consume_id, reverse_of_bill_no, tenant_id,
#{consumeBillNo}, #{consumeBillDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{userId}, #{consumeBillStatus}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteBy}, #{deleteTime}, #{remark}, #{auditBy}, #{auditDate}, #{rejectReason}, #{reverseFlag}, #{reverseOfConsumeId}, #{reverseOfBillNo}, #{scopedTenantId},
mapper.update: update t_hc_ks_xh set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update t_hc_ks_xh set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in
#{id}

update t_hc_ks_xh_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and paren_id in
#{parenId}
update t_hc_ks_xh_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_hc_ks_xh_entry_ref where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and consume_id in
cast(#{id} as char)
mapper.insert:
insert into t_hc_ks_xh_entry( paren_id, material_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, dep_inventory_id, kc_no, batch_id, warehouse_id, department_id, supplier_id, factory_id, material_no, remark, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, main_barcode, sub_barcode, material_date, warehouse_date, settlement_type, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, src_consume_id, src_consume_bill_no, src_consume_entry_id, src_consume_qty, src_can_reverse_qty, create_by, create_time, tenant_id) values
(#{item.parenId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.amt}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchNumer}, #{item.depInventoryId}, #{item.kcNo}, #{item.batchId}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.departmentId}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.factoryId}, #{item.materialNo}, #{item.remark}, #{item.beginTime}, #{item.endTime}, 0, #{item.mainBarcode}, #{item.subBarcode}, #{item.materialDate}, #{item.warehouseDate}, #{item.settlementType}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.materialSpeci}, #{item.materialModel}, #{item.materialFactoryId}, #{item.srcConsumeId}, #{item.srcConsumeBillNo}, #{item.srcConsumeEntryId}, #{item.srcConsumeQty}, #{item.srcCanReverseQty}, #{item.createBy}, now(), (select m.tenant_id from t_hc_ks_xh m where m.id = #{item.parenId} limit 1))

insert into t_hc_ks_xh_entry( paren_id, material_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, dep_inventory_id, kc_no, batch_id, warehouse_id, department_id, supplier_id, factory_id, material_no, remark, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, main_barcode, sub_barcode, material_date, warehouse_date, settlement_type, material_name, material_speci, material_model, material_factory_id, src_consume_id, src_consume_bill_no, src_consume_entry_id, src_consume_qty, src_can_reverse_qty, create_by, create_time, tenant_id) values (#{parenId}, #{materialId}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{amt}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumer}, #{depInventoryId}, #{kcNo}, #{batchId}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{supplierId}, #{factoryId}, #{materialNo}, #{remark}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, 0, #{mainBarcode}, #{subBarcode}, #{materialDate}, #{warehouseDate}, #{settlementType}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{materialFactoryId}, #{srcConsumeId}, #{srcConsumeBillNo}, #{srcConsumeEntryId}, #{srcConsumeQty}, #{srcCanReverseQty}, #{createBy}, now(), (select m.tenant_id from t_hc_ks_xh m where m.id = #{parenId} limit 1))

insert into t_hc_ks_xh_entry_ref( id, tenant_id, consume_id, consume_bill_no, consume_entry_id, consume_bill_date, consume_status, src_bill_kind, src_bill_id, src_bill_no, src_entry_id, department_id, warehouse_id, material_id, material_name, material_speci, material_model, batch_no, batch_number, material_no, supplier_id, factory_id, out_entry_qty, available_qty, default_consume_qty, consume_qty, unit_price, amount, main_barcode, sub_barcode, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{refId}, #{tenantId}, cast(#{parenId} as char), (select m.consume_bill_no from t_hc_ks_xh m where m.id = #{parenId} limit 1), cast(#{id} as char), (select m.consume_bill_date from t_hc_ks_xh m where m.id = #{parenId} limit 1), (select m.consume_bill_status from t_hc_ks_xh m where m.id = #{parenId} limit 1), 'OUT_WAREHOUSE', #{refOutBillId}, #{refOutBillNo}, #{refOutEntryId}, #{departmentId}, #{warehouseId}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{materialSpeci}, #{materialModel}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumer}, #{materialNo}, #{supplierId}, #{factoryId}, #{refOutEntryQty}, #{refOutAvailableQty}, #{refDefaultConsumeQty}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{amt}, #{mainBarcode}, #{subBarcode}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark} )
mapper.select: select max(consume_bill_no) from t_hc_ks_xh where consume_bill_no like concat('%',#{date},'%') and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select dep.id as depInventoryId, cast(dep.bill_id as char) as refOutBillId, dep.bill_no as refOutBillNo, cast(dep.bill_entry_id as char) as refOutEntryId, bill.bill_date as billDate, dep.department_id as departmentId, dep.warehouse_id as warehouseId, dep.material_id as materialId, dep.material_name as materialName, dep.material_speci as materialSpeci, dep.material_model as materialModel, dep.material_factory_id as materialFactoryId, dep.supplier_id as supplierId, dep.factory_id as factoryId, dep.batch_id as batchId, dep.batch_no as batchNo, dep.batch_number as batchNumber, dep.material_no as materialNo, dep.begin_time as beginTime, dep.end_time as endTime, dep.material_date as materialDate, dep.warehouse_date as warehouseDate, dep.main_barcode as mainBarcode, dep.sub_barcode as subBarcode, dep.settlement_type as settlementType, dep.unit_price as unitPrice, dep.qty as availableQty, dep.amt as availableAmount, oe.qty as outEntryQty, case when oe.qty is null then dep.qty when dep.qty > oe.qty then oe.qty else dep.qty end as defaultConsumeQty from stk_dep_inventory dep inner join stk_io_bill bill on bill.id = dep.bill_id and bill.del_flag = 0 and bill.bill_type = 201 left join stk_io_bill_entry oe on oe.id = dep.bill_entry_id and oe.del_flag = 0 where dep.del_flag = 0 and dep.qty > 0 and dep.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and bill.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and bill.bill_status = 2 and not exists ( select 1 from t_hc_ks_xh_entry_ref r where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and r.src_entry_id = cast(dep.bill_entry_id as char) ) and dep.department_id = #{departmentId} and dep.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and dep.bill_no like concat('%', #{consumeBillNo}, '%') and dep.material_id = #{materialId} and (dep.material_name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or dep.material_no like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%')) order by bill.bill_date desc, dep.bill_no desc, dep.id desc

select e.id as srcConsumeEntryId, e.paren_id as srcConsumeId, b.consume_bill_no as srcConsumeBillNo, e.dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, e.material_id as materialId, e.material_name as materialName, e.material_speci as materialSpeci, e.material_model as materialModel, e.unit_price as unitPrice, e.qty as srcConsumeQty, e.batch_no as batchNo, e.batch_number as batchNumer, e.material_no as materialNo, e.begin_time as beginTime, e.end_time as endTime, e.material_date as materialDate, e.warehouse_date as warehouseDate, e.warehouse_id as warehouseId, e.department_id as departmentId, e.supplier_id as supplierId, e.factory_id as factoryId, e.batch_id as batchId, e.main_barcode as mainBarcode, e.sub_barcode as subBarcode, (e.qty - IFNULL(( select SUM(ABS(r.qty)) from t_hc_ks_xh_entry r where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and r.del_flag != 1 and r.src_consume_entry_id = e.id ), 0)) as canReverseQty from t_hc_ks_xh_entry e inner join t_hc_ks_xh b on b.id = e.paren_id and b.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and b.del_flag != 1 where e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.del_flag != 1 and e.paren_id = #{consumeId} and e.qty > 0 and b.consume_bill_status = 2 having canReverseQty > 0 order by e.id

select COALESCE(SUM(e.qty), 0) as totalQty, COALESCE(SUM(e.amt), 0) as totalAmt from t_hc_ks_xh a inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.paren_id = a.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.del_flag != 1 left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id where

select a.consume_bill_no as billNo, a.consume_bill_date as consumeDate, d.name as departmentName, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci as specification, m.model as model, e.unit_price as unitPrice, e.qty as quantity, e.amt as amount, wc.warehouse_category_name as category, fc.finance_category_name as financialCategory, m.register_no as registrationNumber, m.medical_no as medicalInsuranceCode, NULL as hisChargeItemCode, u.unit_name as unitName from t_hc_ks_xh a left join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.paren_id = a.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.del_flag != 1 left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id where order by a.consume_bill_date desc, a.consume_bill_no desc

select d.name as departmentName, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.speci as specification, m.model as model, u.unit_name as unit, SUM(e.qty) as totalQuantity, SUM(e.amt) as totalAmount, AVG(e.unit_price) as averagePrice, wc.warehouse_category_name as category from t_hc_ks_xh a left join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.paren_id = a.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and e.del_flag != 1 left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id where group by d.id, d.name, m.id, m.code, m.name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_id, u.unit_name, wc.warehouse_category_id, wc.warehouse_category_name order by SUM(e.amt) desc
